name: Agent
description: Any AI, replaces Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Open Claw. 17+ LLM providers (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama, Zai, HF, Qwen) wired into a native Mac app that writes code, builds Xcode projects, bumps versions, manages git, Eautomates Safari, AppleScript 50 apps, extend w/ MCP Servers, run tasks from your iPhone via Messages, drive any Accessible app.
summaryZh: Any AI, replaces Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Open Claw. 17+ LLM providers (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama, Zai, HF, Qwen) wired into a native Mac app that writes code, builds Xcode projects, bumps versions, manages git, Eautomates Safari, AppleScript 50 apps, extend w/ MCP Servers, run tasks from your iPhone via Messages, drive any Accessible app. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
